title: AI Engineer ($100K-$400K + Equity) at Solve Intelligence
company_focus:
AI-powered patent technology platform for drafting and
litigation
description:
This is a job that Jill, our AI Recruiter, is recruiting for
on behalf of one of our customers. She will pick the best
candidates from Jack's network

The next step is to speak to Jack.

Job Title: AI Engineer

Salary: $100K-$400K + Equity

Company Description: Solve Intelligence - YC-backed AI
startup transforming the patent industry

Job Description: Join an elite team of Cambridge, Oxford,
and UCL PhDs building the future of AI-powered patent
technology. As an early engineer, you will push the
boundaries of LLM algorithms and agents for a platform
seeing 20-30% month-over-month growth. You’ll solve high-
intensity technical challenges while shipping production
systems to 400+ global IP teams.

Location: London, UK

Why this role is remarkable:

- Join a rocketship with 8-figure ARR and $55M in funding from
  premier investors including Y Combinator, 20VC, and the
  founders of Stripe and Perplexity.
- Work in an ultra-high talent density environment alongside
  former researchers from DeepMind and the Gatsby Unit who
  value raw intelligence over corporate tenure.
- Realize massive upside potential with a compensation package
  including significant equity in a profitable company
  disrupting a $200B+ global industry.

What you will do:

- Design and implement state-of-the-art LLM-powered systems,
  agents, and evaluation pipelines to automate complex
  patent drafting and litigation workflows.
- Architect and scale robust backend infrastructure using
  Python and PostgreSQL to support a rapidly expanding
  global user base and massive document volumes.
- Collaborate directly with the founding team to make
  foundational technical decisions and ship high-impact
  features to production in rapid cycles.

The ideal candidate:

- Demonstrates exceptional raw intelligence through top-tier
  academic performance (Olympiad medalist or first-class
  degree from Oxford, Cambridge, Imperial, or MIT).
- Possesses deep technical expertise in AI/ML, specifically
  with LLMs, and a track record of building production-grade
  systems or publishing at venues like NeurIPS.
- Exhibits a high-intensity builder mentality with the drive
  to thrive in an in-person London startup environment where
  shipping fast is the priority.

Who are Jack & Jill? Ok, I'll go first. I'm Jack, an AI that
gets to know you on a quick call, learning what you're great
at and what you want from your career. Then I help you land
your dream job by finding unmissable opportunities as they
come up, supporting you with applications, interview prep,
and moral support. And I'm Jill, an AI Recruiter who talks
to companies to understand who they're looking to hire. Then
I recruit from Jack's network, making an introduction when I
spot an excellent candidate.

Next steps Step 1. Visit our website. Step 2. Click 'Talk to
Jack'. Step 3. Talk to Jack so he can understand your
experience and ambitions. Step 4. Jack will make sure Jill
(the AI agent working for the company) considers you for
this role. Step 5. If Jill thinks you're a great fit and her
client wants to meet you, they will make the introduction.
Step 6. If not, Jack will find you excellent alternatives.
All for free.

We never post fake jobs This isn't a trick. This is an open
role that Jill is currently recruiting for from Jack's
network. Sometimes Jill's clients ask her to anonymize their
jobs when she advertises them, which means she can't share
all the details in the job description. We appreciate this
can make them look a bit suspect, but there isn't much we
can do about it. Give Jack a spin! You could land this role.
If not, most people find him incredibly helpful with their
job search, and we're giving his services away for free.
responsibilities: Design and implement state-of-the-art LLM-powered systems and agents
Build evaluation pipelines for AI systems
Automate complex patent drafting and litigation workflows
Architect and scale backend infrastructure using Python and PostgreSQL
Support global user base and massive document volumes
Collaborate with founding team on foundational technical decisions
Ship high-impact features to production in rapid cycles
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves designing and implementing LLM-powered
systems, agents, and evaluation pipelines - direct hands-on
work building and deploying AI/LLM systems for patent
automation. This is core AI engineering work.
